commit.message:
Initial commit: PDF to EPUB converter web app

- Flask app with SSE progress streaming on port 5001
- Smart programmatic conversion (no AI needed, fast)
- Optional AI cleanup via Anthropic, OpenRouter, or Groq
- PDF paragraph detection via Y-gap analysis (27.6px gaps)
- Mixed-size block splitting (heading + body in same PDF block)
- Header/footer detection ignores heading-sized text
- Cover image detection from first pages
- Persistent API key/model config via config.json

commit.message:
feat(ai-lab): Add Neural Nexus UI enhancements + remove from Pulse nav

## UI Enhancements (Phases 1-9)

Phase 1 — Shared components:
- AILabOutput: markdown rendering, copy button, word count, loading skeleton
- AILabProgress: indeterminate ring + determinate bar with shimmer
- AILabEmptyState: icon + title + description + optional CTA
- AILabToast: glass-morphism success/error/info toasts

Phase 2-9 — Workspace upgrades:
- QuickActions: per-action colored icons, hover description, AILabOutput
- IntelligenceHub: 8px shimmer progress bars, mission timer, agent expand
- MissionControl: chat timestamps, citation chips, unified panel headers
- ProposalBuilder: section status borders, autosave indicator, step wizard
- AIStudio: formatting toolbar, slide content previews, glass export menu
- StandupBriefing: metrics strip, blocker severity, per-member copy
- ChannelDigest: metrics strip, sentiment badge, indigo time buttons
- AICanvas: node execution states, shortcuts overlay, SVG flow animation

## Surgical Removal from Pulse nav (3 edits)

- src/App.tsx: remove lazy import + case render for AILabHubRedesigned
- src/types.ts: remove AppView.TOOLS enum value
- src/components/Sidebar/Sidebar.tsx: remove AI Lab nav item

AI Lab now lives as a standalone project at F:\AI-LAB.
Builds clean: `✓ built in 40.55s`

Add income mode feature with transaction linking and UI improvements

Implement three-mode income system (Fixed/Actual/Actual & Adjust Budget)
that controls how linked income transactions affect available cash. Add
linkedIncomeSourceId field to transactions with full CRDT sync support.
Income mode toggle cycles through options on the Budget Config page.

Transaction list now shows actual amount on top with budget effect below
for linked transactions. Attribution labels moved below dates. Category
picker auto-sets recurring_income and hides when income is linked.

ACTUAL_ADJUST mode updates income source before computing cash (zero
delta), while ACTUAL mode applies the difference. Manual override
warnings moved to help page with consolidated help sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): resolve NU5019 pack failure by using target-based analyzer packaging

The generator DLL was packaged via a static `<None>` item that resolved
before MSBuild built the project, causing NU5019 "File not found" in CI.

Fix: replace static item with a `PackMapoGenerator` target using
`$(TargetDir)$(AssemblyName).dll`, and add an explicit build step
before pack in the release workflow.

level-builder.js module. levels.js imports them instead of
defining inline.

boundary conditions and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add planet-as-moon system for gas giants

Large planets (gas giants, sub-neptunes) with 3+ moons now have a ~15%
chance per non-innermost moon slot to spawn a full Planet-class moon
instead of a simple Moon. These planet-moons use the complete Planet.js
renderer with clouds, atmosphere, rings, and all 6 eligible planet
types (terrestrial, ocean, ice, rocky, venus, sub-neptune).

Implementation:
- MoonGenerator: new _generatePlanetMoon() calls PlanetGenerator
  internally, returns data with isPlanetMoon flag + full planetData
- main.js spawn: detects isPlanetMoon, creates Planet object with
  thin wrapper providing orbital behavior (Planet.js has no orbit logic)
- main.js update: handles orbital positioning externally for
  planet-moons (same math Moon.js uses internally), syncs light dir
- Shadows: planet-moons receive parent-planet eclipse shadows via
  Planet.js shadow uniforms, cast shadows on parent via existing system
- Click targets: registers planet surface mesh (not Group) for raycast
- Gallery: new "planet-moon" gallery type to preview these objects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Railway DB tasks & auth session repair

Implemented new Babashka tasks to operate article scripts and seed geographic data against Railway production databases via a public TCP proxy (`railway-articles-run` and `seed-geo-railway`). These tasks automatically inject `DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL` and enforce the `prod` profile, simplifying deployment workflows for production environments.

Extended the article DB helper (`scripts/bb/articles/db.clj`) to:
- Parse PostgreSQL URLs (`parse-pg-url`).
- Provide production connection configuration (`prod-db-config`).
- Support `:prod` profile in `read-config`.
- Recognize `prod` in CLI profile parsing (`parse-profile`).

Enhanced authentication route (`src/app/template/backend/routes/auth.clj`) with robust session handling:
- Added `fetch-user-record` to retrieve up‑to‑date user data.
- Implemented `incomplete-auth-session?` to detect stale sessions lacking tenant or membership info.
- Created `repair-incomplete-auth-session` to refresh or clear such sessions, returning actionable repair results.
- Updated `register-handler` to invoke repair logic, log outcomes, and ensure accurate auth status responses.

These changes provide:
- Seamless, secure interaction with Railway production databases without manual tunneling.
- Reliable authentication state, preventing errors caused by outdated user or tenant information.
- Improved observability through structured logging of session repairs and clears.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

commit.message:
fix: Show warning when paired device sync data has no meals

If the server blob has goals/favorites/etc. but no meals, a yellow hint
appears in the DATA RECEIVED section: "No meals in paired device's sync
data — open your other device and press Sync Now, then Force Resync here."

This surfaces the root cause when the other device's last push predates
its meal entries (e.g. after a prolonged token outage).

calling, falling back to Claude when GROQ_API_KEY is not set. Adds type coercion
and failed_generation recovery for Llama's tool call quirks. Credit/billing
errors from any API (Anthropic, Groq, Replicate) now show a friendly user

commit.message:
ci: change review-reviewers from nightly to hourly (#1291)

## Summary

- Changes the review-reviewers workflow from daily (5:47 UTC) to hourly
(:47 past each hour)
- Narrows the scan window from 24 hours to 1 hour to match the new
cadence
- Strengthens deduplication: checks open issues/PRs AND recently closed
ones before creating new ones; prefers commenting on existing issues
over creating duplicates
- Adds full-context guidance: while only scanning runs from the past
hour, the bot pulls in the full PR/issue history when assessing whether
a session went well

Closes #1290

## Test plan

- Workflow syntax is valid YAML with correct cron expression
- No remaining references to old workflow name
- Can be validated with a manual `workflow_dispatch` trigger after merge

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Move entrypoint into Dockerfile for standalone container support

The entrypoint now auto-generates missing secrets even without the
init container, so the pushed image works with plain docker run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Emit coworker.stuck workflow event for dead processes and dead reviewers (#1788)

Previously, only stuck-but-alive coworkers and stuck reviewers emitted
CoworkerStuck workflow events. Dead processes (crashed coworkers) and
dead reviewers (exited without posting review) were handled entirely
inline with no workflow event, leaving the workflow script blind to
these recovery scenarios.

Now both check_and_respawn_dead_processes() and
check_and_restart_dead_reviewers() emit CoworkerStuck events before
respawning, giving channel workflow scripts full visibility into all
coworker recovery scenarios.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
